description: Style NoteYour wardrobe collection is incomplete without this blue kurti from diva. A perfect combination of style and comfort, this kurti will make you look simple yet trendy. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it with denims and flats to make a statement wherever you go.Product DetailsBlue kurti with a mandarin collar and v-neck line, sequins on the placket, short sleeves and split side seamsMaterial and CareBlended fabricDry clean onlySize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing size S
